name: Cold Water Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and slowly mix in sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Add melted chocolate and combine thoroughly.
4. Mix together flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add these dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing well.
6. Gradually add cold water, mixing until smooth.
7. Pour batter into two buttered and floured 8-inch cake pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pans for 5 minutes before turning out onto racks to cool completely before frosting.
